title: carthamus calvus
intro: Carthamus calvus, also known as the woolly thistle, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health conditions. The health benefits of Carthamus calvus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Carthamus calvus can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
